title: Fix dynamic rx_channel in SchedulerConfig, build_announce, and rpl_stack per CCP-9 vectors (offset 1/42 matching generate.py)
close_reason: Fixed dynamic rx_channel in SchedulerConfig and build_announce to use config value (was hardcoded 0); updated rpl_stack test helper to rx_channel=3 per first CCP-9 vector; tests use non-zero path at signed_data offset 42 and L2 offset 1 matching generate.py
